metadata.title: CANoe Configuration Attribute Reference (Vector CANoe 15.0)
metadata.description: Comprehensive reference of all CANoe configuration attributes, channel assignment, database loading, A2L (XCP), and CDD (diagnostic) configuration options.

channel_assignment.description: Channel assignment maps application channels (logical) to physical hardware channels (e.g. CAN1, CAN2 on a VN1610).
config_steps: Open the Vector Hardware Config dialog from the Tools menu
Select the hardware channel to map
Assign the application channel (e.g. CAN 1) to the hardware channel
Configure the baud rate, sample point, and other bus parameters

attributes.name: Channel Number
attributes.description: Logical channel number (1, 2, ...) used in CAPL and configuration.

attributes.name: Application Channel Name
attributes.description: User-friendly name for the application channel.

attributes.name: Baud Rate
attributes.description: Bus baud rate in bps. v15 supports up to 5 Mbit/s for CAN FD.

attributes.name: Sample Point
attributes.description: Sample point as a fraction of the bit time (e.g. 0.875 for CAN FD).

attributes.name: FD Baud Rate
attributes.description: CAN FD data phase baud rate (v15). Up to 5 Mbit/s.

database_loading.description: Configuration of database files (.dbc, .ldf, .xml, .vcdl) for symbolic access.
config_steps: Right-click on the network in the Simulation Setup
Right-click the ECU and select 'Add ECU'
Configure XCP/CCP transport layer (CAN, TCP/IP, FlexRay)
Set the slave address and timing parameters
